data: Large black disk moving at speed through clouds

Craft zipping back and forth from north east to south west
Very fast bright amber light moving north. Faded out a pulsed back many times before disappearing after holding a steady brightness.
Object came down super bright lights no forward or backwards just down. Hovered for a few seconds and was gone.
Saw one fast moving orb. Thought was satellite but then 2nd one quickly approached it. Matched speed and would cross over each other.
Two black horseshoe crab shaped objects heading the reverse direction of the Seatac arrivals flight path.
Lights would appear above the horizon and then disappear over and over.
First looked like circular object with red and green luminosity then seemed to change to horizontal object ( not a plane , stationary)
Circled around then flashed before dissapearing

Triangular shaped, with cut corners. Saw while driving down highway. Low altitude
3 Lights moving in sync in triangle form

We say something that was not an aircraft
Driving along we saw it, as we went behind trees it ascended rapidly. Watched it move unnaturally

A short, inconsistent velocity along a single trajectory

Several bright light (like very bright stars) moving around in variable directions

Saw it cross paths with a jet.. then it flew over us silently with no jetstream?
An X shaped craft with a red light or antigravity generator in the middle
Me and my Wknow 100% for sure that these weren't any kind of weather balloons , Orbs , Star link , rockets , comets or asteroid!!!!!!!!

Cluster of UFOs, DANGEROUSLY close to each other, straightening into a line, then breaking back into a tight cluster, fading in/out.
High speed object resembling boomerang headed east from my location

AP - Bright White Light Moving Southeast - Dissapear then Reappears.

Multiple lights in the sky in line and also in different locations in the sky

Bright light traveling much faster than airplane or helicopter or drone. It also wasn't a satellite or shooting star.

Singular circular object with a lighted ring towards the middle and other lights around the rings.  Hovering very low in low clouds

5 orange oblong orbs in a triangle formation

High alt. heading SW slowly, bright white light glowing then dimming to nothing, repeating.

Size of a semi truck but rectangle shape

It was big . It scared me so bad.
Light coming from above and below it, hovered there with smaller lights move toward it, then it moved fast, turned dim and disappeared

Yellow yellow yellow red color light

Three crafts diverging or expanding away from each other as soon as I spotted them

I recorded by my smart phone
